---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Un-doomed
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem
What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way?

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Does it fit the philosophy?
Un-doomed guides developers to the answer — it **never just writes the fix**.
How does this idea respect *"help people think, don't think for them"*?

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about.

## Which component?
- [ ] Backend / reviewers
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Browser extension
- [ ] Landing page / docs

## Additional context
Mockups, links, or anything else.
